_comment: Base per-model rates in USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Cache multipliers (5m write 1.25x, 1h write 2x, read 0.1x) are universal and live in pricing.py, NOT here. Keys are exact model ids as they appear in transcript message.model. Update from platform.claude.com pricing when rates change.
_verify_before_commit: RATES BELOW ARE BEST-KNOWN ESTIMATES — confirm every value against the official Anthropic pricing page before trusting the $ output of a cost report.
